activity.title: What is an Algorithm?
activity.intro: An algorithm is just a list of steps to do something. Even making a sandwich is an algorithm! Let's see if you can write one.

vocabulary.definition: A step-by-step set of instructions to solve a problem or complete a task.

basic_version.label: Basic Version
basic_version.instructions: Write 5 steps to make a peanut butter sandwich. Be specific!

challenge_version.label: Challenge Version
challenge_version.instructions: Write your steps, then have someone follow them EXACTLY. Did it work? What was missing?

activity.teacher_note: This activity introduces the core CS concept that algorithms are precise instructions. Common gap kids miss: opening the bread bag, using a knife, etc. — the lesson is that computers need extreme specificity.
